reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya nyaman dan bersih harga terjangkau, pelayanan nya ramah dan cepat, check outa bisa hbs shalat Zhuhur
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable and clean, with affordable prices. The service is friendly and fast, and check-out can be done after the Dhuhr prayer.

reviews.reviewTitle: Suitable for a resting place when visiting Aceh Airport.
reviews.originalTitle: Cocok untuk tempat istirahat klau Berkunjung ke Bandara Aceh
reviews.originalComment: Tempat yg strategis & Cocok untuk Beristirahat di Saat ada kepentingan Pekerjaan di Seputar Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: A strategic place & suitable for resting when there are work-related matters around Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Staff Hotel GM Inn super ramah, makanannya enak-enak, kebersihan terjaga seperti handuk, seperi, kamar. Lokasinya strategis, dekat laundry, apotek, dll.. jadi pulang kita ga banyak bawa cucian 🤭, deket banget sama tempat makan bahkan banyak banget tempat makan tinggal pilih mau apa, nah apalagi kalau cari oleh oleh, tinggal jalan dikit ada toko souvenir jadi ga usah puter puter. Utamanya pelayanan di hotel ini, semua staff ramah, baik dan bener bener ngebantu pas kita perlu sesuatu. Makasih banyak ya 🫶🏻
reviews.reviewComments: The staff at GM Inn Hotel are super friendly, the food is delicious, and cleanliness is maintained with towels, sheets, and the room. The location is strategic, close to laundry, pharmacies, etc., so when we go back, we don’t have to carry a lot of laundry 🤭. It’s really close to places to eat, and there are so many options to choose from. And when looking for souvenirs, just walk a little, and there’s a souvenir shop, so no need to drive around. The main highlight of this hotel is the service; all the staff are friendly, kind, and really help when we need something. Thank you very much 🫶🏻.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis di daerah Peunayong,  dekat dengan berbagai tempat. Staf ramah dan komunikatif.
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location in the Peunayong area, close to various places. Friendly and communicative staff.

reviews.reviewTitle: Recommendations for places to stay in Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Rekomendasi tempat menginap di Banda Aceh
reviews.originalComment: Pilihan tepat untuk menginap bersama keluarga, berada di pusat kota Banda Aceh, dekat ke masjid Baiturrahman, tempat kuliner dan perbelanjaan..
reviews.reviewComments: The perfect choice for staying with family, located in the city center of Banda Aceh, near the Baiturrahman Mosque, dining places, and shopping.

reviews.reviewTitle: Recommendations for places to stay in Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Rekomendasi tempat menginap di Banda Aceh
reviews.originalComment: Pilihan tepat untuk menginap bersama keluarga, berada di pusat kota Banda Aceh, dekat ke masjid Baiturrahman, tempat kuliner dan perbelanjaan..
reviews.reviewComments: The perfect choice for staying with family, located in the city center of Banda Aceh, near the Baiturrahman Mosque, dining places, and shopping.

reviews.originalComment: Kali ketiga menginap disini. Hotel yg sangat rekomen utk menginap bersama keluarga. Lokasi strategis d tengah kota. Pelayanan dr staff yg sangat exelent dr resepsionis lisa dan staff lain terkhusus Pak Ade yg membuat liburan kami di banda aceh jd istimewa. Sukses trus GM Inn Hotel Syariah Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments: This is my third time staying here. A highly recommended hotel for staying with family. The location is strategic in the city center. The service from the staff is excellent, especially from receptionist Lisa and other staff, particularly Mr. Ade, who made our vacation in Banda Aceh special. Wishing continued success to GM Inn Syariah Hotel Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan Staff sangat ramah , 👍👍👍, kamar bersih dan nyaman 👍👍👍 bakalan nginap disini lagi next ke ACEH 🙏🙏🙏
reviews.reviewComments: The staff service is very friendly, 👍👍👍, the room is clean and comfortable 👍👍👍 I'll definitely stay here again next time in ACEH 🙏🙏🙏

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi hotel sangat strategis dan dekat dengan pusat oleh-oleh, sarapannya sangat enak namun kamar agak kurang kedap suara sisanya baik
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel location is very strategic and close to the souvenir center, the breakfast is very good, but the room is a bit less soundproof; the rest is fine.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar nya agak kecil tp bersih.karyawannya ramah2.daerah strategis.tidak ada di minta byr biaya tambahan lain pas cek in .
reviews.reviewComments: The room is a bit small but clean. The staff is friendly. It's in a strategic area. There were no additional fees requested during check-in.

reviews.originalComment: Menginap tgl 18 Agustus 24, hotel nyaman, bersih.  Rekomendasi bagi yg mau cari penginapan di Banda aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Stayed on August 18, 2024, comfortable and clean hotel. Recommended for those looking for accommodation in Banda Aceh.
Wonderful staying experience. The room was so spaces and the staff were so friendly and helpful.

The rooms have little to no windows at all. The sheets and towels seemed used and washed many times .the room is small, you can't open the wardrobe next to the bed.  The stuff was very helpful and nice. No problem to change the room, as we didn't like a room with no window. No one speaks English and we had some difficulties in that respect.  Very good coffee in the lobby - no problem to get it although it was Ramadan. Location is 15 min by car to the Ulelue ferry point.  Markets and restaurant are near.
the room 106 , was so noisy near the security and kitchen , U can sleep there , u can hear the staff talking and noise from kitchen

reviews.reviewTitle: Overpriced for a barely acceptable room
reviews.reviewComments: Small, dirty and run down rooms. You’ll hear everything from your neighbours too due to the poor design of the rooms. Bugs in bed. Way overpriced for the condition. Staff lovely though and location great.

Bilik agak sempit.. nk buka luggage pun sempit.. ruang yg ada muat2 utk solat shj.. bilik air kurang bersih.. air perlahan.. tuala lama.. aircond kna ambil masa untuk sejuk.. sy akan repeat lagi hotel ni..
Not so good. Bad room derty, door broken, bed room smelt. Breakpest not enaught (too little)

Small window in the room which neighbour can look through from their 2nd floor balcony.
Toilet NOT CLEAN ‼️ ‼️ ‼️  
PROBLEM TO CLOSE ‼️ ‼️ ‼️  FROM INSIDE toilet, A STONE / BRICK IS USED ‼️ ‼️ ‼️  
SHOWER HEAD TOO LOW ~ BUILD FOR DWARFS / MIDGETS ! ! !  
Water from pipe tasted funny. 
Breakfast VERY BASIC. 
WATER  dispenser NOT WORKING property.
Miss ATIKAH & Mr SYAFRAN from FRONT OFFICE were OUTSTANDING ‼️ ‼️ ‼️
HILMAN & RENDY were OK. 
ARY & ANTO were  *VERY RUDE*  ‼️  ‼️
***Should be renamed GM  INN only, remove "HOTEL" ‼️   **30 rooms & in a mess ‼️ ‼️ 
WE DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS PLACE TO ANYONE. 
IT'S SUPPOSED TO BE 2 stars ‼️
We recommend PLUM HOTEL LADING 3 stars & lots better ...... & cheaper ❤️
Call us if you want to get any clarification : +601969 44626 RATIONALE OBSERVER 🌹🌺💞

Filthy towels, no hand basin, dirty bed, big ducting holes joining the rooms, so you can hear everything, and smell your neighbours (smoking) used toothbrush’s left in bathroom,, don’t waste your money

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk hanya sekedar tidur ok lah, tapi kalau sekaligus bekerja ringan dengan laptop NO
meja kok pendek amat, bikin sakit pinggang dan kamar sangat sempit
reviews.reviewComments: It's fine for just sleeping, but if it's also for light work with a laptop, NO. The table is too short, it causes back pain, and the room is very cramped.
Just nice
Mantab sangat recomended
good
Good value for cheap price in center of Banda aceh
the room was small with poor toilet. not good for sick or old people
Good
Shower tidak berfungsi, akhirnya mandi pakai kran

Kualitas sudah jauh menurun 
Kebersihan sangat kurang
Menu sarapan tidak ada variasi
Location is great, Room is clean and cozy

We were frustrated to see our junior suite is different from what Agoga advertised. We booked the room when we saw it offers 1 twin AND queen bed. Yet when we arrived the staff said Agoda is the one who tricked us. They never had such arrangement and we were given with 1 bed.

The bathroom is terrible, moldy with faulty door. The door handle felt down from time to time. Strong cigarettes odour filled the room so badly and disturbing. Yet we have no option and had to settle down as it was late night already. We are both female and do not dare to find alternatives. 
We went for breakfast but food were finished and the hotel did not replenished it 
All lead to frustration level 4.

when I booked the room it said I would get 1 queen bed and 1 single bed, but when I arrived in the hotel it turned to be 1 queen bed or 2 single bed, although the staff letter upgraded my room to be king bed but it wasn’t still make things right

reviews.reviewTitle: Best budget hotel in banda aceh
reviews.reviewComments: Great budget hotel near culinary centre in banda aceh
8 out of 10

reviews.reviewTitle: excellent deal and location in Chinatown
reviews.reviewComments: Great staff. Unfortunately had to shorten stay due to back injury. Be careful walking in Banda Aceh.
Very recommended
Easy acces.. Nice environment
enak sih, lumayan banget dengan harganya dapet kamar fasilitas yg cukup

reviews.reviewTitle: Overprice for KOS KOSAN like hotel.
reviews.reviewComments:
Pros :
1. Lokasi 

Cons : 
1. Harga 300ribu untuk Junior suite dengan dinding TRIPLEK? 
2. Ini bukan hotel sih, lebih tepatnya KOS KOSAN di ruko tepi jalan utama. 
3. They are not eligible to put "Hotel" behind the name. 
4. Handle pintu pake gagang lemari 😭😭
5. Bersihan kamar mandi rumah gw daripada kamar mandi Junior Suite  
6. It is not junior suite class, but again KOS KOSAN. 🤟

They are OVERVALUED themselves and the room is truly OVERPRICE.
Good
Good place for the money

3. Kebersihan Kurang Baik
4. Ruangan Tidak Nyaman
5. Breakfast Alakadarnya

Untuk harga tersebut....sangat mengecewakan
Value of money, good location , clean

Lokasinya dekat dengan Pasar Peunayong. 
Kalau malam dekat street food.
Simple.. Yet cozy and clean hotel and also easy acces ...
Big room it’s worth it

I have never stayed in a hotel with no toilet paper. Only here.
Everything you see on the photo is not as you expected to be.
You get what you pay for 20k rupiah. However, there are many other hotel with much better facilities.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih, pelayananya bagus, lokasi dekat dgn pusat makanan dan harga terjangkau
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, the service is good, the location is close to the food center, and the prices are affordable.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat nyaman dan harga paling terjangkau.staff sangat ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is very comfortable and has the most affordable prices. The staff is very friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Super nyaman staff sangat ramah, pokoknya is the best 👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: Super comfortable, the staff is very friendly, definitely the best 👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment: mantaaap hotel nya bersih dan ramah rsmah
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is great, clean, and friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat rekom utk pelayanannya
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended for the service.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya nyaman, strategis dipusat kota dan dekat tempat kuliner
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is comfortable, strategically located in the city center, and close to dining places.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan bagus terus tingkatkan
reviews.reviewComments: Good service, keep improving.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk parkir mobilnya susah kalo banyak yg nginap, kamarnya lumayan sempit, selimutnya bau ketiak orang lain
reviews.reviewComments: It's difficult to park the car when there are many guests staying, the room is quite small, and the blanket smells like someone else's armpit.

reviews.originalComment: hotelnya bersih cuma agak sempit tapi lokasinya bagus untuk kita kemana-kemana mesjid raya musium ataupun mencari ole-ole.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean but a bit cramped, but its location is good for going anywhere like the grand mosque, museums, or looking for souvenirs.

reviews.reviewTitle: NOT WORTH IT COMPARE THE SAME PRICE WITH ANOTHER HOTEL
reviews.reviewComments: Room Smelly and toilet floor dirty ..even shower handle dirty. Breakfast 2 set option only "nasi goreng mentah and nasi putih with 1 kind of lauk .and hot drink you must push until you tired because litle water drop from machine. Room look like a RM30 cost .Sorry to say you but that the reality we have in GM INN Hotel .But we like receptionist fast response and very kind person .near hotel have a lot kind of restaurant and stall food .you can choose hat you want to eat.tq

reviews.originalComment: Petugas hotelnya ramah 2 dan kamarnya bgs dan bersih. Recomended bg bapak2 dan ibu2 yg ingin ke bandah aceh. Lokasi tidak jauh dr mesjid agung bandah aceh.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel staff is friendly, and the rooms are good and clean. Highly recommended for gentlemen and ladies who want to go to Banda Aceh. The location is not far from the Great Mosque of Banda Aceh.

Pros: The hotel location is great. There is a laundry and pharmacy next to the Hotel. 

Cons: The water pressure is very low, difficult to take bath. The hotel need to fix it soonest possible. The wifi connection not very strong. They did not switch on the aircond at the dining area during the breakfast time, hence it is quite warm and not comfortable.

reviews.reviewTitle: Cheap and Affordable Hotels in Banda Aceh City
reviews.originalTitle: Hotel Murah Meriah di kota Banda Aceh
reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya bersih, fasilitas lengkap sesuai dengan harganya.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, with complete facilities in accordance with its price.

My 6 days stay.
1. Banyak nyamuk dan semut.
Kami belanja makanan ringan ole ole dimasukin semut semua makanan tersebut. 
Semut semua jenis  ada halus besar merah.
2. Malam2 terpaksa berperang dengan nyamuk. 
3. Iron hanya 1 unit dihotel. Selepas diguna pengguna lain tunggu lebih 30 mt. Tapi akhirnya tak dapat juga sebab tidak dapat ambil dari pengguna lain.
Iron pun tak licin bila digosokkan.
4. Kunci bilik hanya satu . Should  be  2. Saya terpaksa duduk lobi 1.30 jam sebab suami bawa kunci solat jumaat. Minta pada front desk mereka tiada kunci spare. 
5. Pintu tandas tak boleh tutup.
Sangat tidak puas hati. Keseluruhan 2 star.
6.Namun staf sangat budi bahasa. 
7. Disediakan sarapan pagi yang bagus.
Food and satf I give 4 star.

reviews.originalComment: Stafnya ramah, sarapannya cukup enak, kebersihan lumayan.
reviews.reviewComments: The staff is friendly, the breakfast is quite good, and the cleanliness is decent.
Cheap but nice facility. Excellent location. Super friendly staff.n

reviews.originalComment:
Saya berkunjung dengan keluarga untuk urusan pekerjaan.
Saya mendapatkan perlakuan yang kurang baik saat ingin check in, namun setelahnya perlakuan petugas membaik.
Kamar pengap, kurang bersih kamar mandi berkerak, air mandi tidak panas.
Namun lokasi ditengah kota membuat mudah kemana mana
reviews.reviewComments: I visited with my family for work purposes. I received poor treatment during check-in, but afterwards the staff's treatment improved. The room was stuffy, the bathroom was not clean and had stains, and the shower water was not hot. However, the location in the city center makes it easy to go anywhere.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat menginap yg menyenangkan, staff hotel yg ramah, makanan enak. 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: A pleasant place to stay, friendly hotel staff, delicious food. 👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.reviewTitle: It may depend on the room...
reviews.originalComment:
スタッフはみんな親切でフレンドリーです
窓なし、エアコン、テレビ、Wi-Fi
水シャワー、シャンプー、歯磨き
宿泊客が多いと朝食が豪華でした
空港送迎も頼めます
この金額なら満足！
reviews.reviewComments:
The staff are all kind and friendly.  
No windows, air conditioning, TV, Wi-Fi.  
Water shower, shampoo, toothpaste.  
Breakfast was luxurious when there were many guests.  
Airport transfer can also be requested.  
I'm satisfied with this amount!

This place in Peunayong offers a great location with plenty of food and souvenir options. Unlike the nearby hotels near Masjid Baiturrahman, it is not overcrowded and noisy with honking cars. The staff are friendly and welcoming, making for a pleasant stay. The breakfast is simple but satisfying. Overall, it's a great choice for those looking for a quieter retreat with convenient amenities.

reviews.originalComment: Staff ramah...hotel bersih...sarapan OK...cuma pintu2 mungkin perlu di perbaiki.
reviews.reviewComments: Friendly staff...clean hotel...breakfast is okay...just the doors might need some repairs.
We love the stay! It is close to eateries, cafes and many shops around the hotel. We upgraded to suite and it is spacious and clean. The staffs are very helpful and friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis, dekat pertokoan, tempat makan, dll. Kamar bersih, resepsionis selalu stay, jadi nyaman dan aman. Kalau krmana² juga dekat, mau sewa motor atau sepeda pu  juga bisa.
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location, close to shops, dining places, etc. Clean rooms, the receptionists are always present, making it comfortable and safe. It's also close to various places, and you can rent a motorcycle or bicycle if you want.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi strategis..dipusat kotA.mudah cari maKan..foodcourt 250m dari hotel.dekat tpt beli oleh".minus tpt parkir tidak ada.hanya muay 3mobil di dpn hotel.sisa nya numpang didepan toko orng lain.
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location..in the city center. Easy to find food..food court 250m from the hotel. Near a place to buy souvenirs. Minus parking space, there is none. Only accommodates 3 cars in front of the hotel. The rest have to park in front of other people's shops.

reviews.originalComment: Orangnya ramah-ramah semua, tidak sombong, mau membantu, terima kasih
reviews.reviewComments: The people are all friendly, not arrogant, willing to help, thank you.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel bersih dan staff sangat ramah. Recommended bgt ini hotel.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and the staff is very friendly. Highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Recommended lah walaupun pertama masuk dikasih kamar yang ac nya tidak berfungsi. kemudian setelah lapor akhirnya diganti dengan kamar yang lebih bagus. Stafnya pun sangat ramah
reviews.reviewComments: Recommend it even though at first I was given a room with a non-functioning air conditioning. After reporting it, I was finally given a better room. The staff was very friendly as well.

reviews.originalComment: Staffnya ramah2, kamarnya bersih. Tempatnya nyaman dan nyaman juga kalau bawa anak2.. udah bebrpa kali balik lagi k hotel ini karna senyaman itu
reviews.reviewComments: The staff is friendly, the rooms are clean. The place is comfortable and it's also nice for bringing kids. I've returned to this hotel several times because it's that comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan memuaskan, staf sangat ramah dan membantu. Harga ekonomis, tapi barang bawaan sampe dibantu antar ke kamar. Fasilitas kamar berfungsi dg baik, kami tidak ada sandal hotel, ada parkir motor di dalam, dapat sarapan nasi kotak tapi agak kesiangan sih kalo distribusinya hampir jam 8. Lokasi sangat strategis dekat pusat oleh oleh, dekat tempat wisata kota dan wisata kuliner. Nice
reviews.reviewComments: Satisfying service, very friendly and helpful staff. Economical prices, but the luggage was helpfully taken to the room. Room facilities functioned well, we didn't have hotel slippers, there is motorcycle parking inside, and we received boxed breakfast but it was a bit late since distribution was almost at 8 o'clock. The location is very strategic, close to the souvenir center, near city tourist attractions and culinary tourism. Nice.

reviews.reviewTitle: The service from the staff is extraordinary.
reviews.originalComment: Akses kemanapun dekat dan mudah, banyak tempat jual makanan di sekitar, bersebalahan dengan kimia Farma, kamar wangi, worth it lah dengan harganya . Apalagi dapat harga lebih murah di Agoda. Saran, minimal ambil kamar junior suite.. kamar lebih luas dan dapat sarapan dua nasi kotak.
reviews.reviewComments: Access to anywhere is close and easy, there are many places to buy food around, next to Kimia Farma, fragrant room, it's worth the price. Especially since you can get a cheaper price on Agoda. Suggestion, at least take a junior suite room... it's more spacious and comes with two boxed meals for breakfast.

reviews.reviewTitle: Budget hotel with good service and complete facilities.
reviews.originalTitle: Budget Hotel pelayanan yang Baik dan fasilitas lengkap
reviews.originalComment:
Hotel berbentuk ruko, lokasi ditengah kota, dekat dengan pusat kuliner.  
Kebersihan hotel baik.
Receptionist sangat membantu dan seluruh staf hotel ramah, dan saya diperbolehkan early check in.

Harus bayar deposito

Fasilitas : ada lift, kamar mandi dalam kamar, TV, Teko listrik utk masak air panas, air mineral, teh celup, telepon dalam kamar, handuk, sabun, shampo, sikat gigi dan pasta gigi.

Recomended hotel
reviews.reviewComments:
The hotel is shaped like a shop house, located in the city center, close to the culinary center.  
The cleanliness of the hotel is good.  
The receptionist is very helpful and all the hotel staff are friendly, and I was allowed early check-in.

A deposit must be paid.

Facilities: there is an elevator, private bathroom in the room, TV, electric kettle to boil water, mineral water, tea bags, telephone in the room, towels, soap, shampoo, toothbrush, and toothpaste.

Recommended hotel.

Internet ne fonctionne pas, les petits déjeuner ne sont pas assurés pendant le ramadan. Pas de lavabo dans les chambres état vétuste je donnerai une note de 5/10 vous êtes avisés. Je suis un voyageur averti avec une grande expérience

Stanza diversa da quella indicata in fotografia,dotazione bagno inesistente. Pulizia minima
Nice room with comfortable beds. Very helpful and friendly staff!!

Good
Kebersihan kamar dan toilet baik. Sarapan enak. Hanya saja banyak nyamuk di kamar dan sekitar hotel.

Hotel dekat dengan pusat kuliner malam. Cari makanan mulai dari sarapan sampai makan malam mudah. Sayangnya hotel banyak nyamuk, sarapan pun kurang enak dan kurang varaitif. Klo untuk sekedar tidur boleh lah hotel ini. Sebanding dengan harga
Lokasi super strategis. Dekat dengan kuliner, souvenir, dan tepat dijalan raya. Dapat sarapan pagi. Hotel pake lift
Interiornya kelihatan kusam dan kebersihan toilet sgt kurang
Apapun baik disini, hanya saja sarapan pagi mohon di upgare yaa… sederhana saja makanannya yg penting syedapp
Saya nginap seminggu sangat puas,,staf nya ramah2

Stayed at the junior suite. Room was so small and very humid. Molds everywhere on the bathroom. Sink didn’t work. Fortunately sheet was clean and location was strategic. Recommend you to stay in another type of room.
